creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202661
update mkfontscale and remove mkfontdir

mkfontsdir has been merged into mkfontscale.  Since this touches a lot of ports, and a lot of dependencies, I'd like to request an exp run to ensure I haven't missed anything.
Attached patch updates mkfontscale to 1.2.0 and removes mkfontsdir.  It then updates infrastructure and bumps portrevisions.
